constraints.coverage_assumption: User constraint set is minimal: only "efficient inference" for LLMs is specified. No further filters (hardware, quantization-only, latency vs. throughput, open vs. closed model, domain) should be invented; recommendations span complementary efficient-inference techniques.

entities: why each paper fits "efficient inference for LLMs"
normalized_question: Recommend up to 3-5 papers on efficient inference for LLMs, with each recommendation grounded in the user's specific selection constraints and an explicit reason it fits.

obligations.description: Select up to 3-5 distinct papers that directly address the requested topic and explain from source evidence why each fits. Do not substitute adjacent topics when the corpus lacks an exact match.
